arts.ttl: Source: Man United's Onana dropped for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: André Onana has been left out of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Newcastle on Sunday, a source has told ESPN, following heavy criticism of performance against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘reignite interest’ in Japan goalkeeper amid Onana errors
arts.sum: Manchester United have reignited their interest in Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki, amid concerns over Andre Onana’s performances at Old Trafford. Onana was at fault for both goals as Manchester United drew 2-2 at Lyon in their Europa League quarter-final on Thursday night. arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand confronted me after I dug him out – I told him he's in Man United's pocket
arts.sum: Former Crystal Palace chairman Simon Jordan didn't hold back in his assessment of Rio Ferdinand as a pundit - and he told the Manchester United legend exactly why

arts.ttl: Andre Onana omitted from Manchester United squad vs Newcastle
arts.sum: After a night to forget in Lyon, Andre Onana's week is set to end with his absence from the Man United squad at Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana is left OUT of Man United's squad for trip to Newcastle - as Ruben Amorim keeps goalkeeper out of the firing line after his Europa League horror show
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Onana was blamed for both Lyon's goals when United were held to a Europa League draw in France in midweek, but is likely to be recalled for Thursday's second leg at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes responds to Real Madrid summer transfer bid
arts.sum: That is according to Football Insider, who report that Bruno has made it clear to Madrid that he will not be quitting Man Utd at the end of the season. Bruno Fernandes has rejected a summer move to Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Man United 'leading Premier League race to sign star who scored against them in the Europa League with winger rated at £20m'
arts.sum: The Red Devils visited Lyon in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final in midweek and were moments away from securing a huge 2-1 victory before the star struck late.

arts.ttl: Man United begin negotiations to sign 21-year-old prodigy after scouting him several times
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their defensive unit in the summer, and they have identified Jonas Adejetey as a target. The 21-year-old has done quite well for FC Basel, and the Ghana International is attracting a lot of interest with his performances. According to a report from Africa Foot, Manchester United have sent officials […] The post Man United begin negotiations to sign 21-year-old prodigy after scouting him several times appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Eddie Howe statement as head coach admitted to hospital
arts.sum: A club statement read: "Eddie Howe will miss Newcastle United ’s Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday due to illness. Howe, who missed the Press conference on Friday to preview the game with the Red Devils, has been admitted to hospital due to an illness.

arts.ttl: £40m striker confirmed as summer transfer target for Man United
arts.sum: Man United will certainly be aiming to sign a new striker this summer, and at this stage, they are reported to have several names on their shortlist. Victor Osimhen and Viktor Gyokeres are two players that have been strongly linked, but someone closer to home could be sought instead as an upgrade on current options […] The post £40m striker confirmed as summer transfer target for Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.
